text: Being here, I am surrounded by the hum of curiosity and inquiry. The hallway outside the conference room feels expectant—people linger, perhaps in anticipation or wonder. Inside, the R+D exhibition space radiates a spirit of innovation. The design is bold and colorful, celebrating human progress and the interplay between knowledge and creativity. I feel contemplative and inspired, aware of the intricate dance between solitude and shared discovery that unfolds in places dedicated to research and development.
